executives.name: Andrea Utecht
executives.background: Ms. Utecht has served as a director since 2018. She was formerly Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Secretary of FMC Corporation from 2001 to 2018.

executives.name: Jonathan Evans
executives.background: Mr. Evans has more than 20 years of operations and general management experience across the chemical and manufacturing industries. He previously served as President and CEO of Lithium Americas Corp. (now Lithium Americas (Argentina) Corp.) and has held executive roles at FMC Corporation and Arysta LifeScience.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President and General Manager, Lithium Division

executives.name: Paul Graves
executives.background: Mr. Graves has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer and as a director since May 2018. Before joining Livent, Mr. Graves was Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of FMC from 2012 to 2018. He previously served as a partner in the Investment Banking Division at Goldman Sachs Group in Hong Kong and was co-head of Natural Resources in Asia.

executives.name: Pierre Brondeau
executives.background: Dr. Brondeau has served as Chairman of the Board of Livent since 2018. He is the former CEO and Chairman of FMC Corporation. He also serves on the board of TE Connectivity Ltd.

executives.name: Robert Pallash
executives.background: Mr. Pallash has served as a director since 2018. He was formerly President, Global Customer Group and Senior Vice President of Visteon Corporation.

executives.name: Sara Ponessa
executives.background: Ms. Ponessa has served as our Vice President, General Counsel and Secretary since 2018. Prior to joining Livent, she was Senior Counsel at FMC from 2014 to 2018. Previously, she served as Vice President and Assistant General Counsel at AstraZeneca.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, General Counsel, and Corporate Secretary

board_of_directors.name: Pierre Brondeau
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Brondeau has served as Chairman of the Board of Livent since 2018. He is the former CEO and Chairman of FMC Corporation. He also serves on the board of TE Connectivity Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: Robert Pallash
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Pallash has served as a director since 2018. He was formerly President, Global Customer Group and Senior Vice President of Visteon Corporation.
